risks.title: Geopolitical Risks
risks.description: Lufthansa's stock tumbled despite record earnings due to geopolitical and labor risks.
risks.evidence: AskTraders: Lufthansa Stock Tumbles Despite Record Earnings as Geopolitical and Labor Risks Cloud Outlook - AskTraders

risks.title: Labor Disputes
risks.description: Lufthansa is facing the threat of a marathon strike by pilots' union Vereinigung Cockpit.
risks.evidence: Flightright: Lufthansa strike compensation  Up to €600  - Flightright

risks.title: Competition from Low-Cost Carriers
risks.description: Lufthansa is facing harsh competition from low-cost carriers like Emirates, which are setting their sights on Lufthansa's lucrative long-haul routes.
risks.evidence: Streit um Drehkreuze  Emirates und Co. setzen Lufthansa zu: Streit um Drehkreuze

risks.title: Pilot Strikes and Labor Negotiations
risks.description: Lufthansa is facing new tariff negotiations with its pilots' union, which may lead to further strikes.
risks.evidence: Lufthansa  Nach Pilotenstreik neue Tarifgespräche mit Gewerkschaft: Lufthansa  Nach Pilotenstreik neue Tarifgespräche mit Gewerkschaft

opportunities.title: Personalized Travel Experience
opportunities.description: Lufthansa can leverage technology to offer personalized travel experiences, enhancing customer satisfaction and loyalty.
opportunities.evidence: Innovation in Aviation  the Lufthansa Innovation Hub: Tino Klaehne from the Lufthansa Innovation Hub explains how new technology enhances the travel experience

opportunities.title: Digital Transformation of Airline Operations
opportunities.description: Lufthansa can improve operational efficiency and reduce costs by adopting digital technologies, such as intelligent software and digital transformation.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa Systems   IT-Innovationen für die Luftfahrt: Lufthansa Systems ist Ihr zuverlässiger Partner für intelligente Software und digitale Transformation in der Airline-Branc

opportunities.title: Strategic Partnership with PROS
opportunities.description: Lufthansa can benefit from its strategic partnership with PROS, enhancing revenue management and pricing capabilities.
opportunities.evidence: PROS and Lufthansa Group Extend Strategic Partnership - Business Wire: PROS and Lufthansa Group Extend Strategic Partnership

opportunities.title: Increased Profitability through Digital Innovation
opportunities.description: Lufthansa can increase profitability by investing in digital innovation, such as the Lufthansa Innovation Hub.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa Group is consistently pursuing its strategy and aims to significantly increase profitability - Lufthansa Group Newsroom: Lufthansa Group is consistently pursuing its strategy and aims to significantly increase profitability

trends.title: Digital Transformation
trends.description: Lufthansa is undergoing a comprehensive digital transformation to increase efficiency and profitability, with a focus on innovation programs, technology initiatives, and investments.

trends.title: Digitalization in Aviation
trends.description: Lufthansa is leveraging digital twin technology to enhance the travel experience and future-proof the company, with a focus on intelligent IT solutions for airlines worldwide.

trends.title: Innovation in Aviation
trends.description: The Lufthansa Innovation Hub is driving innovation in aviation, with a focus on using technology to offer guests a better travel experience and make the company fit for the future.
trends.evidence: Innovation in Aviation  the Lufthansa Innovation Hub

trends.title: Holistic Digital Transformation
trends.description: The Lufthansa Group's Digital Hangar is driving a holistic digital transformation with agile methods, innovative solutions, and an effective enterprise architecture to optimize the customer experience.
